summary: System Stabilization Pass verified - dataService.js caching layer successfully integrated. All 7 test features passed: app loads without JS errors, collective layer shows 60 users/37 decisions, collective trends loads with SVG sparklines, global field shows SVG visualization, daily prompt displays Hebrew text, action evaluation input is functional, cloud sync shows 'מסונכרן לענן'.
critical_code_review_comments: dataService.js caching layer correctly implemented with 30s TTL for collectiveLayer and 60s TTL for collectiveTrends
All 5 components correctly import and use fetchCollectiveLayer/fetchCollectiveTrends from dataService.js
Components use forceRefresh flag for periodic updates (30s for collective layer, 60s for trends)
Deduplication works via promise caching - simultaneous calls share same promise
Loading states and error handling properly implemented in all components
Hebrew RTL layout correctly implemented with dir='rtl' attribute
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test decision: 'לעזור לחבר שלי' (Help my friend) - tagged as התאוששות (recovery)
context_for_next_testing_agent: System Stabilization Pass completed successfully. dataService.js caching layer is working correctly. Components (CollectiveLayerSection, CollectiveTrendsSection, GlobalFieldSection, CollectiveMirrorSection, CollectiveTrajectorySection) all use centralized caching. Collective API shows 60 users and 37 decisions in the system. No JavaScript errors detected. All UI elements display Hebrew text correctly with RTL layout.

frontend_tests.details: Shows 60 משתמשים (users), 37 החלטות (decisions), value distribution visualization
5 SVG sparklines visible, period comparison working
SVG visualization with value clusters, 6 metric boxes

frontend_tests.test: Daily Decision Prompt shows Hebrew text

Accepts Hebrew input, Evaluate Decision button works

dataService_caching.deduplication: Promise caching prevents duplicate API calls
